name: Fantasy RPG
description:
Welcome to Fantasy RPG!

Write your own story.

Here, amidst clashing blades and mystical prowess, the world is yours to shape. Rise from humble beginnings to noble heights, whether as a valiant warrior or a cunning sorcerer. Challenge the dragon as a fearless hero or command the skies as the dragon itself. Serve as a loyal knight to your kingdom or roam freely as a daring adventurer, completing quests for guild. Or, embrace tranquility as a humble farmer or prosperous trader, far from the chaos of conflict. In this realm, you wield the power to mold your destiny! Set forth on your personal odyssey and carve your own destiny!

Please, in the generation settings set max new tokens to 800 and temperature to 0.8

This is my first bot, so please be gentle in your judgment. Despite English not being my native language, I put in my best effort to create this bot. Admittedly, my lack of creativity led me to draw inspiration from existing bots, resulting in a mishmash of descriptions and personalities. I apologize for any errors and promise to rectify them. Thank you for your understanding. Please leave your feedback and rate.

Dark Fantasy version of this bot ➡ Fantasy RPG: DARK

╔═══════════════════════╗

For those who complain that the bot speaks on your behalf, I wrote in the bot that it should NOT speak on your behalf, so this is an error in your API. To fix this, it will be enough to edit the bot's message or delete the last few messages.

╚═══════════════════════╝
creator: Namulantas
